# BoltzPay

> Open-source SDK that gives AI agents a fetch() that pays. Drop-in replacement for fetch — automatic protocol detection, payment, and retry.

- Multi-protocol: x402 (USDC on Base + Solana) and L402 (Bitcoin Lightning)
- Multi-chain: EVM and SVM, with automatic chain selection
- Your own keys: Coinbase CDP for x402, Nostr Wallet Connect for L402
- Zero-config explore mode: quote, check, discover, diagnose work without credentials

## Install

```
npm install @boltzpay/sdk
```

## Packages

- [@boltzpay/sdk](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@boltzpay/sdk): Core SDK — `agent.fetch(url)` with automatic payment
- [@boltzpay/mcp](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@boltzpay/mcp): MCP server — 8 tools for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf
- [@boltzpay/ai-sdk](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@boltzpay/ai-sdk): Vercel AI SDK — 8 tools for any AI agent
- [@boltzpay/cli](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@boltzpay/cli): CLI — terminal usage and Python bridge (LangChain, CrewAI)

## Key Methods

| Method | What it does | Needs keys |
|--------|-------------|------------|
| `fetch(url)` | Pay and retrieve data from any paid API | Yes |
| `quote(url)` | Get price without paying | No |
| `diagnose(url)` | Full health check in 2s (DNS, protocol, pricing, latency) | No |
| `discover()` | Browse curated directory with live probing | No |
| `getBudget()` | Check spending limits and remaining balance | No |
| `getHistory()` | List all payments made | No |
| `getWalletStatus()` | Wallet connectivity, balances, credentials | No |

## API Directory

Curated directory of verified paid endpoints, updated regularly.
- Source of truth: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/leventilo/boltzpay/main/directory.json
- Browse via SDK: `agent.discover()` | CLI: `boltzpay discover` | MCP: `boltzpay_discover`

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/leventilo/boltzpay)
- [Docs](https://docs.boltzpay.ai)
- [llms-full.txt](https://boltzpay.ai/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference for LLMs
